code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_forge.x:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    ACTIVITY FORGE — LA FORGE D'HÉPHAÏSTOS
    PHASE C — RéviZeus
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    Architecture :
      - Fond plein écran bg_forge_hephaistos (fallback bg_rpg_dialog)
      - Header fixe : bouton retour + titre CINZEL
      - HUD fragment : HorizontalScrollView avec chips par matière
      - RecyclerView : liste des recettes (item_recipe_card.xml)

    IDs exposés à ForgeActivity via ViewBinding :
      btnForgeBack, tvForgeTitle, llFragmentHud,
      rvRecipes, tvForgeEmptyState
    ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-->
<LinearLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@drawable/bg_forge_hephaistos">

    <!-- ── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <RelativeLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutForgeHeader"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="68dp"
        android:background="#CC0A0A14"
        android:paddingStart="12dp"
        android:paddingEnd="12dp"
        android:elevation="8dp">

        <!-- Bouton retour -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnForgeBack"
            android:layout_width="44dp"
            android:layout_height="44dp"
            android:layout_centerVertical="true"
            android:layout_alignParentStart="true"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="←"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="26sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true" />

        <!-- Titre central -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_centerInParent="true"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:gravity="center">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvForgeTitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="FORGE D'HÉPHAÏSTOS"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="18sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:letterSpacing="0.08" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Forge du Savoir"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
                android:textColor="#B8860B"
                android:textSize="11sp"
                android:layout_marginTop="2dp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- Icône dieu (décoration) -->
        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgForgeIcon"
            android:layout_width="60dp"
            android:layout_height="60dp"
            android:layout_alignParentEnd="true"
            android:layout_centerVertical="true"
            android:contentDescription="Héphaïstos"
            android:scaleType="fitCenter"
            android:scaleX="2"
            android:scaleY="2"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_forge_hephaistos" />
    </RelativeLayout>

    <!-- ── HUD DES FRAGMENTS ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <!-- Bandeau horizontal scrollable montrant les fragments du joueur -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:background="#14000000"
        android:paddingTop="8dp"
        android:paddingBottom="8dp">

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
            android:text="⚗ VOS FRAGMENTS DE CONNAISSANCE"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:textColor="#CCFFD700"
            android:textSize="11sp"
            android:letterSpacing="0.1" />

        <HorizontalScrollView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:scrollbars="none"
            android:overScrollMode="never"
            android:layout_marginTop="6dp">

            <!-- Ce LinearLayout est rempli programmatiquement par ForgeActivity -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/llFragmentHud"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="horizontal"
                android:paddingStart="14dp"
                android:paddingEnd="14dp"
                android:gravity="center_vertical" />
        </HorizontalScrollView>
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- ── SÉPARATEUR DORÉ ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="1dp"
        android:background="#4DFFD700" />

    <!-- ── TITRE SECTION RECETTES ─────────────────────────────── -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="12dp"
        android:paddingBottom="8dp">

        <View
            android:layout_width="3dp"
            android:layout_height="16dp"
            android:background="#FFD700"
            android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:text="RECETTES DISPONIBLES"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:textColor="#E8D07A"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            android:letterSpacing="0.06" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvForgeRecipeCount"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:fontFamily="@font/vt323_regular"
            android:text="— recettes"
            android:textColor="@color/ic_launcher_background"
            android:textSize="15sp" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- ── LISTE DES RECETTES ────────────────────────────────── -->
    <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
        android:id="@+id/rvRecipes"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:layout_weight="1"
        android:paddingStart="12dp"
        android:paddingEnd="12dp"
        android:paddingBottom="16dp"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        android:overScrollMode="never" />

    <!-- ── EMPTY STATE (affiché si 0 recettes) ───────────────── -->
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvForgeEmptyState"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:padding="32dp"
        android:text="Héphaïstos attend tes fragments…\nRéponds correctement en quiz pour en obtenir."
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:textColor="#66FFD700"
        android:textSize="14sp"
        android:lineSpacingExtra="6dp"
        android:visibility="gone" />

</LinearLayout>

<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:id="@+id/rootGameUpdate"

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/imgBottomVignette"

    <ScrollView
        android:id="@+id/scrollMain"

        android:paddingTop="18dp"
        android:paddingEnd="18dp"
        android:paddingBottom="18dp">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutMain"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:gravity="center_horizontal"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgZeus"
                android:layout_width="104dp"
                android:layout_height="104dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                android:contentDescription="Zeus"
                android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />

            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/cardHeader"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="12dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/cardHeaderBg"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="50dp"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_divine_card" />

                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutHeaderContent"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_gravity="center"
                    android:gravity="center_horizontal"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:paddingStart="18dp"
                    android:paddingTop="16dp"
                    android:paddingEnd="18dp"
                    android:paddingBottom="16dp">

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvTitle"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:letterSpacing="0.05"
                        android:text="⚡ RÉALIGNEMENT DE L’OLYMPE ⚡"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:textSize="18sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:text="Les systèmes secondaires du monde peuvent être remis en ordre sans toucher à la progression du héros."
                        android:textColor="#FFF6D6"
                        android:textSize="13sp" />
                </LinearLayout>
            </FrameLayout>

            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/cardVersion"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="14dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/cardVersionBg"

                    <TextView

                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"

                        android:textSize="15sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvVersionValue"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                        android:textColor="#FFF2C4"
                        android:textSize="14sp" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvReasonLabel"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
                        android:text="Raison"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:textSize="15sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvReasonValue"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                        android:textColor="#FFF2C4"
                        android:textSize="14sp" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvRecoveryBadge"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
                        android:background="#55330000"
                        android:paddingStart="10dp"
                        android:paddingTop="6dp"
                        android:paddingEnd="10dp"
                        android:paddingBottom="6dp"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:textSize="12sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold"
                        android:visibility="gone" />
                </LinearLayout>
            </FrameLayout>

            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/cardPreserved"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="14dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/cardPreservedBg"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:adjustViewBounds="true"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog" />

                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutPreserved"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:padding="16dp">

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvPreservedLabel"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:text="Données sanctuarisées"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:textSize="15sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvPreservedContent"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                        android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp"
                        android:text="Lecture des archives du héros..."
                        android:textColor="#FFF2C4"
                        android:textSize="14sp" />
                </LinearLayout>
            </FrameLayout>

            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/cardProgress"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="14dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/cardProgressBg"

                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:adjustViewBounds="true"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog" />

                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutProgress"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:padding="16dp">

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvProgressLabel"

                    <ProgressBar

                    <TextView

                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvProgressStep"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                        android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp"
                        android:textColor="#FFF2C4"
                        android:textSize="14sp" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvUpdateHint"

                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
                        android:textColor="#FFE7A7"
                        android:textSize="12sp" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
    android:id="@+id/rootLayout"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="@drawable/bg_olympus_animated">

    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#11000000" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTitleBg"
        android:layout_width="400dp"
        android:layout_height="65dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="28dp"
        android:elevation="0dp"
        android:scaleType="fitXY"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvDestinyTitle"
        android:layout_width="340dp"
        android:layout_height="65dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="28dp"
        android:background="@android:color/transparent"
        android:elevation="2dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:shadowColor="#FFD700"
        android:shadowDx="0"
        android:shadowDy="0"
        android:shadowRadius="30"
        android:text="FORGE TON DESTIN"
        android:textColor="@color/ambre_promethee"
        android:textSize="32sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutStatues"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:weightSum="2"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/layoutDialogRPG"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvDestinyTitle">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnHero"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="16dp">

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgHero"
                android:layout_width="250dp"
                android:layout_height="250dp"
                android:src="@drawable/statue_hero_abstract_chibi" />

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgTxtHero"
                android:layout_width="250dp"
                android:layout_height="161dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="5dp"
                android:scaleType="fitCenter"
                android:src="@drawable/txt_hero_blue" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnHeroine"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="16dp">

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgHeroine"
                android:layout_width="250dp"
                android:layout_height="250dp"
                android:src="@drawable/statue_heroine_abstract_chibi" />

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgTxtHeroine"
                android:layout_width="250dp"
                android:layout_height="160dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="5dp"
                android:scaleType="fitCenter"
                android:src="@drawable/txt_heroine_pink" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutDialogRPG"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="160dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:clipChildren="false"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:padding="12dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            android:layout_width="120dp"
            android:layout_height="160dp"
            android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusName"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="2dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="ZEUS"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusSpeech"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginStart="2dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:text=""
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="15sp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvZeusName" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutConfirmButtons"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:visibility="gone"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"
            android:layout_marginEnd="16dp">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnNo"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="NON"
                android:backgroundTint="#FF5252"
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnYes"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="OUI"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                android:backgroundTint="#FFD700"
                android:textColor="#000000"
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel" />
        </LinearLayout>

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_hero_se:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    activity_hero_select.xml — Sélection des héros d'un compte
    Correctif :
    - fond animé via AnimatedBackgroundHelper
    - particules olympiennes branchées
    - panneau sobre, sans ressources géantes disproportionnées
    - RecyclerView qui affichera des cartes alignées sur item_account_card
-->
<RelativeLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:id="@+id/rootHeroSelect"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#05050A" />

    <com.revizeus.app.OlympianParticlesView
        android:id="@+id/olympianParticlesView"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:clickable="false"
        android:focusable="false" />

    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#18000000" />

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutHeroSelectHeader"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="74dp"
        android:layout_alignParentTop="true"
        android:layout_marginStart="12dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="12dp">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:contentDescription="@null"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_divine_card" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnBackHeroSelect"
            android:layout_width="56dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="←"
            android:textColor="#EAD8A3"
            android:textSize="26sp" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:paddingStart="58dp"
            android:paddingEnd="58dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:letterSpacing="0.08"
                android:text="⚔  TES HÉROS"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="18sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvHeroSelectEmail"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:ellipsize="end"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:maxLines="1"
                android:text=""
                android:textColor="#F4E7B7"
                android:textSize="12sp" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </FrameLayout>

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutHeroSelectPanel"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:layout_below="@id/layoutHeroSelectHeader"
        android:layout_marginStart="12dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="12dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="12dp">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:alpha="0.78"
            android:contentDescription="@null"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog" />

        <View
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="#12000000" />

        <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView
            android:id="@+id/rvHeroSlots"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:clipToPadding="false"
            android:paddingTop="12dp"
            android:paddingBottom="18dp"
            android:scrollbars="none" />
    </FrameLayout>

</RelativeLayout>

<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"

        android:layout_width="match_parent"

        android:id="@+id/tvSkipHint"

</FrameLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_invento:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#07070E">

    <ImageView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:alpha="0.38"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_hero_profile" />

    <RelativeLayout
        android:id="@+id/headerInventory"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="60dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_divine_card">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnBackInventory"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:paddingStart="16dp"
            android:paddingEnd="12dp"
            android:text="←"
            android:textColor="#EAD8A3"
            android:textSize="26sp" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_centerInParent="true"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:text="SAC DU HÉROS"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="18sp" />
    </RelativeLayout>

    <HorizontalScrollView
        android:id="@+id/scrollInventoryTabs"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="54dp"
        android:layout_below="@id/headerInventory"
        android:layout_marginStart="10dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="10dp"
        android:fillViewport="true"
        android:scrollbars="none">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutInventoryTabs"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_hero_panel"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:padding="6dp">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tabFragments"
                android:layout_width="122dp"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="FRAGMENTS"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_bg"
                android:textSize="12sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tabArtefacts"
                android:layout_width="122dp"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="ARTEFACTS"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_bg"
                android:textSize="12sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tabEquipements"
                android:layout_width="132dp"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="ÉQUIPEMENTS"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_bg"
                android:textSize="12sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tabObjets"
                android:layout_width="112dp"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="OBJETS"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_bg"
                android:textSize="12sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tabReliques"
                android:layout_width="116dp"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="RELIQUES"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_bg"
                android:textSize="12sp" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </HorizontalScrollView>

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutInventorySortBar"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="42dp"
        android:layout_below="@id/layoutFilterChips"
        android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingStart="6dp"
        android:paddingEnd="6dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvSortCurrent"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:text="Tri : Obtention"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="12sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnSortMenu"
            android:layout_width="32dp"
            android:layout_height="32dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="▼"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- PACK 2 — Filtres par type -->
    <HorizontalScrollView
        android:id="@+id/layoutFilterChips"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_below="@id/headerInventory"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        android:paddingStart="8dp"
        android:paddingEnd="8dp"
        android:paddingTop="4dp"
        android:paddingBottom="4dp">
        
        <com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup
            android:id="@+id/chipGroupFilters"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            app:singleSelection="true"
            app:checkedChip="@id/chipTous">
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipTous"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="TOUS"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipBouclier"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="BOUCLIER"
                android:textColor="#1E90FF"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipArme"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="ARME"
                android:textColor="#FF4444"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipArtefact"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="ARTEFACT"
                android:textColor="#9C27B0"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipParchemin"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="PARCHEMIN"
                android:textColor="#4CAF50"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
            <com.google.android.material.chip.Chip
                android:id="@+id/chipOffrande"
                style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Chip.Choice"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="OFFRANDE"
                android:textColor="#FF9800"
                app:chipBackgroundColor="#1A1A2E" />
            
        </com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup>
    </HorizontalScrollView>

    <ScrollView
        android:id="@+id/scrollInventory"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:layout_below="@id/layoutInventorySortBar"
        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
        android:fillViewport="true"
        android:paddingStart="10dp"
        android:paddingEnd="10dp"
        android:paddingBottom="18dp">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/inventoryContainer"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:paddingBottom="24dp" />
    </ScrollView>

</RelativeLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="@drawable/bg_olympus_school"
    android:padding="24dp">

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/btnInfoLogin"
        android:layout_width="48dp"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="4dp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:alpha="0.35"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="i"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="20sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </FrameLayout>


    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivZeusMascot"
        android:layout_width="120dp"
        android:layout_height="120dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
        android:contentDescription="Revizeus"
        android:src="@drawable/revizeus"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.497"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvTitle"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:text="REJOINS L'OLYMPE"
        android:textAlignment="center"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="26sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/ivZeusMascot" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvSubtitle"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:text="Ton compte divin, une seule fois."
        android:textColor="?android:attr/colorFocusedHighlight"
        android:textSize="13sp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvTitle" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutEmailInline"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="60dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingStart="0dp"
        android:paddingEnd="6dp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvSubtitle">

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/etEmail"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:hint="Email du Héros"
            android:inputType="textEmailAddress"
            android:paddingStart="20dp"
            android:paddingEnd="12dp"
            android:textColor="#000000"
            android:textColorHint="@color/design_default_color_primary" />

        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnGoogleInlineShell"
            android:layout_width="46dp"
            android:layout_height="46dp"
            android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
            android:layout_marginEnd="2dp"
            android:clickable="false"
            android:focusable="false">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button_inset" />

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/btnGoogleInline"
                android:layout_width="40dp"
                android:layout_height="40dp"
                android:layout_gravity="center"
                android:adjustViewBounds="true"
                android:clickable="true"
                android:contentDescription="Connexion Google"
                android:focusable="true"
                android:scaleType="fitCenter"
                android:src="@drawable/ic_google_olympus" />
        </FrameLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- Conteneur du champ mot de passe avec bouton œil -->
    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/passwordContainer"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="60dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/layoutEmailInline">

        <EditText
            android:id="@+id/etPassword"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:hint="Mot de passe (6 caractères min.)"
            android:inputType="textPassword"
            android:paddingStart="20dp"
            android:paddingTop="0dp"
            android:paddingEnd="56dp"
            android:paddingBottom="0dp"
            android:textColor="#000000"
            android:textColorHint="@color/design_default_color_primary_dark" />

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/ivTogglePassword"
            android:layout_width="35dp"
            android:layout_height="35dp"
            android:layout_gravity="end|center_vertical"
            android:layout_marginEnd="16dp"
            android:alpha="1"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:contentDescription="Afficher le mot de passe"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_view" />
    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- Lien de récupération mot de passe — Phase 1 Firebase -->
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvForgotPassword"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
        android:text="Mot de passe perdu ?"
        android:textColor="@android:color/holo_orange_dark"
        android:textSize="14sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/passwordContainer" />

    <!-- Image de fond du bouton -->
    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTempleButton"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="70dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
        android:elevation="0dp"
        android:scaleType="fitXY"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvForgotPassword" />

    <!-- Bouton texte au-dessus de l'image -->
    <Button
        android:id="@+id/btnSubmit"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="70dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
        android:background="@android:color/transparent"
        android:elevation="2dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:text="FORGER MON COMPTE"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="16sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvForgotPassword" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvSwitchMode"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
        android:text="Déjà initié ? → Se connecter"
        android:textColor="@android:color/holo_orange_dark"
        android:textSize="18sp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/btnSubmit" />

    <!-- Zeus chibi RPG dialog en bas -->
    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutDialogRPG"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="130dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:clipChildren="false"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:padding="12dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            android:layout_width="100dp"
            android:layout_height="130dp"
            android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusName"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="ZEUS"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusSpeech"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:text=""
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvZeusName" />

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xm:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    LAYOUT ORACLE — Écran caméra (CameraX)
    ─────────────────────────────────────────
    CORRECTION v12 — PROBLÈME 1 :
    ✅ Suppression du fond noir android:background="#000000" sur le ConstraintLayout racine.
       Le fond noir apparaissait EN DESSOUS du PreviewView CameraX et était visible
       brièvement au démarrage. On le retire complètement : c'est le PreviewView
       qui remplit tout l'écran et sert de "fond" naturel.
    ✅ L'overlayFrame (cadre de visée blanc semi-transparent) est conservé mais
       rendu plus propre : contour blanc au lieu d'un fond semi-opaque gênant.
    ✅ Le bouton capture reste ancré en bas, visible sur le flux caméra.
-->
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent">
    <!-- PAS de android:background ici : la caméra remplit tout l'écran proprement -->

    <!-- ─── FLUX CAMÉRA (plein écran) ───────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <androidx.camera.view.PreviewView
        android:id="@+id/viewFinder"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent" />

    <!--
        ─── CADRE DE VISÉE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        Sert de guide visuel pour cadrer le cours à scanner.
        On utilise un simple stroke (contour) doré sans fond opaque
        pour ne pas masquer le flux caméra.
        Fond transparent = on voit bien ce qu'on va photographier.
    -->
    <View
        android:id="@+id/overlayFrame"
        android:layout_width="397dp"
        android:layout_height="634dp"
        android:background="@drawable/frame_scan_guide"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.42" />

    <!-- ─── TEXTE D'INSTRUCTION ──────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <TextView
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
        android:text="Cadrez le texte du cours dans le cadre doré"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="13sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        android:shadowColor="#000000"
        android:shadowDx="1"
        android:shadowDy="1"
        android:shadowRadius="4"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/btnCapture"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

    <!--
        ─── BOUTON CAPTURE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        FloatingActionButton blanc, visible sur n'importe quel fond de caméra.
        Ancré en bas au centre, 40dp de marge.
        Initialement GONE — OracleActivity.startCamera() le rend VISIBLE.
    -->
    <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton
        android:id="@+id/btnCapture"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginBottom="40dp"
        android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_camera"
        android:visibility="gone"
        app:backgroundTint="#FFFFFF"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:tint="#000000" />

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main_me:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    activity_main_menu.xml — Les Portes de l'Olympe
    ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    3 boutons FrameLayout (règle design #10 — 3 couches) :
    ① btnDemarrerAventure  = "NOUVEAU COMPTE"        → LoginActivity (inscription)
    ② btnChargerPartie     = "CHARGER UN COMPTE"     → LoginActivity (connexion email)
    ③ btnChargerHeros      = "CHARGER UN HÉROS"      → AccountSelectActivity (local)

    IDs ① et ② conservés (rétrocompat ViewBinding existant).
-->
<RelativeLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <!-- Fond -->
    <ImageView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_debut"
        android:alpha="0.85"
        android:contentDescription="@null" />

    <!-- Overlay -->
    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#66000000" />

    <!-- Titre RéviZeus -->
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvMainMenuTitle"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_centerHorizontal="true"
        android:layout_marginTop="52dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
        android:text="RÉVIZEUS"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="30sp"
        android:letterSpacing="0.2" />

    <TextView
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_centerHorizontal="true"
        android:layout_below="@id/tvMainMenuTitle"
        android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:text="L'OLYMPE DU SAVOIR"
        android:textColor="#AAFFD700"
        android:textSize="12sp"
        android:letterSpacing="0.15" />

    <!-- Conteneur des 3 boutons centré -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutMenuButtons"
        android:layout_width="300dp"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_centerInParent="true"
        android:orientation="vertical">

        <!-- ① NOUVEAU COMPTE (ancien btnDemarrerAventure conservé) -->
        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnDemarrerAventure"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="62dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:alpha="0.30"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:letterSpacing="0.06"
                android:text="✦  NOUVEAU COMPTE"
                android:textColor="@color/ambre_promethee"
                android:textSize="14sp" />
        </FrameLayout>

        <!-- ② CHARGER UN COMPTE (ancien btnChargerPartie conservé) -->
        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnChargerPartie"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="62dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:alpha="0.30"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:letterSpacing="0.06"
                android:text="📜SE CONNECTER"
                android:textColor="@color/incorrect_text"
                android:textSize="14sp" />
        </FrameLayout>

        <!-- ③ CHARGER UN HÉROS EXISTANT (NOUVEAU) -->
        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnChargerHeros"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="62dp"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:alpha="0.35"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout"
                android:contentDescription="@null" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:text="⚔  CHARGER UN HÉROS EXISTANT"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="13sp"
                android:letterSpacing="0.05" />
        </FrameLayout>

    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- Version en bas -->
    <TextView
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_alignParentBottom="true"
        android:layout_centerHorizontal="true"
        android:layout_marginBottom="20dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:text="v1.0.5 — Révizeus"
        android:textColor="#55FFD700"
        android:textSize="10sp" />

</RelativeLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView
        android:id="@+id/playerTempleBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:keepScreenOn="true"
        app:show_buffering="never"
        app:use_controller="false"
        app:use_artwork="false" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTempleBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="#6605050A"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingStart="20dp"
        android:paddingTop="14dp"
        android:paddingEnd="20dp"
        android:paddingBottom="14dp">

        <ImageButton
            android:id="@+id/btnBackTemple"
            android:layout_width="52dp"
            android:layout_height="52dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
            android:contentDescription="Retour"
            android:padding="10dp"
            android:scaleType="centerInside"
            android:src="@drawable/ic_settings_gameplay" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:paddingStart="14dp">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvTempleTitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Temple"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="24sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvTempleSubtitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Matière • Niveau"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFFFF"
                android:textSize="14sp" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/templeCanvas"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:layout_marginTop="84dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="150dp" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/nodeDetailsCard"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_gravity="bottom"
        android:layout_marginStart="18dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="18dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="16dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingStart="18dp"
        android:paddingTop="14dp"
        android:paddingEnd="18dp"
        android:paddingBottom="14dp">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvNodeTitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Node"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="18sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvNodeType"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="Type"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFFFF"
                android:textSize="13sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvNodeDescription"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
                android:text="Description du node"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFFFF"
                android:textSize="13sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvNodeStatus"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                android:text="Statut"
                android:textColor="#FFBF00"
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnEnterNode"
            android:layout_width="200dp"
            android:layout_height="50dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
            android:text="Entrer"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            android:textColor="#1A0A00"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

</FrameLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/btnInfoMood"
        android:layout_width="48dp"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="18dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="14dp"
        android:scaleX="1.3"
        android:scaleY="1.3"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:alpha="0.35"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="i"
            android:textColor="@color/incorrect_text"
            android:textSize="20sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </FrameLayout>


    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivMoodBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:alpha="0.3"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_mood_oracle"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTitleBg"
        android:layout_width="400dp"
        android:layout_height="55dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="50dp"
        android:elevation="0dp"
        android:scaleType="fitXY"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvTitle"
        android:layout_width="320dp"
        android:layout_height="55dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="50dp"
        android:background="@android:color/transparent"
        android:elevation="2dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:text="QUELLE EST TON HUMEUR ?"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="20sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivZeusMood"
        android:layout_width="140dp"
        android:layout_height="140dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
        android:src="@drawable/revizeus"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/layoutMoodButtons"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.498"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvTitle" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutMoodButtons"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="20dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/layoutDialogRPG"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ivZeusMood">

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnMoodHappy"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="65dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="15dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#2E7D32"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="⚡ JOYEUX "
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:cornerRadius="16dp" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnMoodTired"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="65dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="15dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#1A237E"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="💤 FATIGUÉ"
            android:textColor="#90CAF9"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:cornerRadius="16dp" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnMoodStressed"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="65dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#B71C1C"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="🌿 STRESSÉ"
            android:textColor="#FFCDD2"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:cornerRadius="16dp" />

    </LinearLayout>

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutDialogRPG"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="140dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="4dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:clipChildren="false"
        android:clipToPadding="false"
        android:padding="12dp"
        android:visibility="gone"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            android:layout_width="90dp"
            android:layout_height="120dp"
            android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusName"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="ZEUS"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvZeusSpeech"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginStart="4dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="2dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:text=""
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@+id/imgZeusDialog"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@+id/tvZeusName" />

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivOracleBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:alpha="0.5"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_olympus_dark" />

    <androidx.camera.view.PreviewView
        android:id="@+id/viewFinder"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent" />

    <View
        android:id="@+id/scan_line"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="4dp"
        android:background="#80FFD700"
        android:elevation="4dp"
        android:visibility="gone" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutLoading"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#CC000000"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:visibility="gone">

        <ProgressBar
            android:layout_width="64dp"
            android:layout_height="64dp"
            android:indeterminateTint="#FFD700" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="L'Olympe forge ton savoir..."
            android:textColor="#FFD700" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutError"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#CC000000"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:visibility="gone">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvErrorStatus"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="20dp"
            android:text="L'Olympe est injoignable"
            android:textColor="#FF4444" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnRetry"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:backgroundTint="#FFD700"
            android:text="RÉESSAYER"
            android:textColor="#000000" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnBackDashboard"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#333333"
            android:text="RETOUR" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutCaptureSession"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_gravity="top"
        android:layout_marginStart="16dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="16dp"
        android:background="#AA0B0B14"
        android:elevation="6dp"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="14dp"
        android:visibility="gone">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvSelectedCount"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="Aucune page capturée pour le moment"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="14sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:text="Capture toutes les pages du cours avant l'invocation."
            android:textColor="#D9E8FF"
            android:textSize="12sp" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:gravity="end"
            android:orientation="horizontal">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnResetBatch"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:backgroundTint="#8B1E1E"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
                android:text="EFFACER"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="11sp"
                android:visibility="gone" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnValidateBatch"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginStart="10dp"
                android:backgroundTint="#FFD700"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
                android:text="ENVOYER À L'ORACLE"
                android:textColor="#000000"
                android:textSize="11sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:visibility="gone" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <ImageButton
        android:id="@+id/btnCapture"
        android:layout_width="191dp"
        android:layout_height="182dp"
        android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal"
        android:layout_marginBottom="40dp"
        android:background="@android:color/transparent"
        android:scaleType="fitCenter"
        android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_camera" />

</FrameLayout>
