<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:id="@+id/oraclePromptRoot"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivOraclePromptBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:alpha="0.18"
        android:contentDescription="@null"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_oracle" />

    <com.revizeus.app.OlympianParticlesView
        android:id="@+id/oraclePromptParticles"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:clickable="false"
        android:focusable="false" />

    <ScrollView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:fillViewport="true"
        android:padding="18dp"
        android:scrollbars="none">

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:gravity="center_horizontal"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:paddingTop="22dp"
            android:paddingBottom="22dp">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="64dp"
                android:contentDescription="@null"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="-48dp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:text="PAROLE À L'ORACLE"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="18sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="34dp"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:orientation="horizontal">

                <ImageView
                    android:layout_width="72dp"
                    android:layout_height="72dp"
                    android:contentDescription="@null"
                    android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvOraclePromptSpeech"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginStart="10dp"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:padding="12dp"
                    android:text="Décris ce que tu veux comprendre, résumer, simplifier ou transformer en révision. L'Oracle forgera d'abord un résumé, puis te laissera choisir si tu veux lancer le quiz."
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="12sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <EditText
                android:id="@+id/etOraclePrompt"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="220dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="18dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_tab_selected"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:gravity="top|start"
                android:hint="Exemple : résume-moi la photosynthèse pour un élève stressé de 5e, ou explique-moi simplement la Révolution française..."
                android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences"
                android:minHeight="220dp"
                android:padding="16dp"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                android:textColorHint="#88FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="14sp" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:text="L'Oracle reste fidèle à ta demande et prépare ensuite un quiz potentiel à partir du savoir généré."
                android:textColor="#CCFFFFFF"
                android:textSize="11sp" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="22dp"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:orientation="horizontal">

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/btnBackPrompt"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="52dp"
                    android:layout_marginEnd="8dp"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                    android:gravity="center"
                    android:padding="12dp"
                    android:text="RETOUR"
                    android:textColor="@color/incorrect_text"
                    android:textSize="12sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/btnInvokePrompt"
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="52dp"
                    android:layout_marginStart="8dp"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                    android:gravity="center"
                    android:padding="12dp"
                    android:text="INVOQUER LES ORACLES"
                    android:textColor="@color/ic_launcher_background"
                    android:textSize="12sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />
            </LinearLayout>

        </LinearLayout>
    </ScrollView>

</FrameLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_quiz.xm:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivBgQuiz"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:alpha="0.15"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_olympus_dark"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutHeaderQuiz"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="18dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/ivZeusQuiz"
            android:layout_width="84dp"
            android:layout_height="84dp"
            android:contentDescription="Dieu du quiz"
            android:scaleType="fitCenter"
            android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:paddingStart="10dp">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvGodName"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:text="ZEUS"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="20sp" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvProgress"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:text="Question 1 / 10"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="14sp" />

            <ProgressBar
                android:id="@+id/pbQuestionProgress"
                style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="8dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                android:max="10"
                android:progress="1"
                android:progressBackgroundTint="#33261A"
                android:progressTint="#FFD700" />

            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/layoutQuestionTimer"
                android:layout_width="226dp"
                android:layout_height="52dp"
                android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal"
                android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                android:clipChildren="false"
                android:clipToPadding="false">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/imgQuestionTimerBg"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:adjustViewBounds="false"
                    android:contentDescription="@null"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_quiz_timer_divine" />

                <LinearLayout
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:gravity="center"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:paddingStart="38dp"
                    android:paddingTop="8dp"
                    android:paddingEnd="38dp"
                    android:paddingBottom="8dp">

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvQuestionTimer"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                        android:letterSpacing="0.05"
                        android:text="00:20"
                        android:textColor="#F7E7AE"
                        android:textSize="12sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <ProgressBar
                        android:id="@+id/pbQuestionTimer"
                        style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
                        android:layout_width="124dp"
                        android:layout_height="4dp"
                        android:layout_marginTop="5dp"
                        android:max="20"
                        android:progress="20"
                        android:progressBackgroundTint="#3B102030"
                        android:progressTint="#DDBA62" />
                </LinearLayout>
            </FrameLayout>
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <ScrollView
        android:id="@+id/scrollQuestion"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="0dp"
        android:fillViewport="true"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="6dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="6dp"
        android:scrollbars="none"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/layoutAnswers"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutHeaderQuiz">

        <FrameLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
            android:padding="16dp">

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="QUESTION DIVINE"
                    android:textColor="#FFD700"
                    android:textSize="12sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvQuestion"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"
                    android:minLines="4"
                    android:paddingTop="4dp"
                    android:paddingBottom="4dp"
                    android:text="Question..."
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:textSize="20sp" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </FrameLayout>
    </ScrollView>

    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutAnswers"
        android:layout_width="0dp"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="12dp"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/btnNext"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnOptA"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#333333"
            android:gravity="start|center_vertical"
            android:maxLines="6"
            android:minHeight="64dp"
            android:paddingStart="14dp"
            android:paddingTop="12dp"
            android:paddingEnd="14dp"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp"
            android:text="A)"
            android:textAlignment="viewStart"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnOptB"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp"
            android:backgroundTint="#333333"
            android:gravity="start|center_vertical"
            android:maxLines="6"
            android:minHeight="64dp"
            android:paddingStart="14dp"
            android:paddingTop="12dp"
            android:paddingEnd="14dp"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp"
            android:text="B)"
            android:textAlignment="viewStart"
            android:textAllCaps="false"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />

        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnOptC"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:backgroundTint="#333333"
            android:gravity="start|center_vertical"
            android:maxLines="6"
            android:minHeight="64dp"
            android:paddingStart="14dp"
            android:paddingTop="12dp"
            android:paddingEnd="14dp"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp"
            android:text="C)"
            android:textAlignment="viewStart"

    <ImageView

                    <LinearLayout

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/tvResultTitle"
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"

                            android:textColor="#FFD700"
                            android:textSize="18sp" />

                        <TextView
                            android:id="@+id/tvResultSubtitle"
                            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"

                </LinearLayout>

                <TextView

                    android:layout_marginTop="10dp"

                    android:textSize="16sp" />
            </LinearLayout>
        </LinearLayout>
    </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

    <LinearLayout

        <ProgressBar

            android:backgroundTint="#B71C1C"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
            android:text="🔁 REFAIRE"
            android:textColor="#FFFFFF" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <LinearLayout

        android:layout_marginBottom="24dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"

        android:visibility="gone"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"

        <View

        <LinearLayout

            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"

            android:padding="8dp">

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgGodSave"

            <LinearLayout

                <TextView

            <Button

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:id="@+id/rootRevizeusInfo"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView
        android:id="@+id/playerViewInfo"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:keepScreenOn="true"
        app:resize_mode="zoom"
        app:show_buffering="never"
        app:use_controller="false" />

    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#8A05050A" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="18dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="16dp">

        <FrameLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="RÉVIZEUS — LE MYTHE"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="20sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />
        </FrameLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal">

            <FrameLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:layout_marginEnd="6dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

                <ImageView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:alpha="0.35"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout" />

                <Button
                    android:id="@+id/btnInfoRetour"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="RETOUR"
                    android:textColor="#FFD700"
                    android:textSize="14sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />
            </FrameLayout>

            <FrameLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:layout_marginStart="6dp">

                <ImageView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

                <ImageView
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:alpha="0.30"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout" />

                <Button
                    android:id="@+id/btnInfoNextBg"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="match_parent"
                    android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="AUTRE FOND"
                    android:textColor="#1A0A00"
                    android:textSize="14sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />
            </FrameLayout>
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:alpha="0.5"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="12dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                android:text="📜 PARCHEMIN DU DESTIN"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="15sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <ScrollView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="0dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:fillViewport="true"
                android:scrollbars="none">

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvInfoContent"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"
                    android:text="Chargement du mythe..."
                    android:textColor="#F5F1E8"
                    android:textSize="14sp" />
            </ScrollView>
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

</FrameLayout>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivSavoirBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:alpha="0.30"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_olympus_school" />

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:orientation="vertical">

        <RelativeLayout
            android:id="@+id/headerSavoir"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp"
            android:paddingTop="32dp"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/btnBackSavoir"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_centerVertical="true"
                android:clickable="true"
                android:focusable="true"
                android:paddingEnd="16dp"
                android:scaleX="1.5"
                android:scaleY="1.5"
                android:text="←"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="28sp" />

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/ivTitleBg"
                android:layout_width="220dp"
                android:layout_height="45dp"
                android:layout_centerInParent="true"
                android:elevation="0dp"
                android:scaleType="fitXY"
                android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvSavoirTitle"
                android:layout_width="220dp"
                android:layout_height="45dp"
                android:layout_centerInParent="true"
                android:background="@android:color/transparent"
                android:elevation="2dp"
                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:text="SAVOIRS"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="22sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

        </RelativeLayout>

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvSavoirSubtitle"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:paddingHorizontal="20dp"
            android:paddingBottom="16dp"
            android:text="Choisis un dieu pour explorer ses cours — Zeus"
            android:textColor="#AAAAAA"
            android:textSize="13sp" />

        <View
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="1dp"
            android:layout_marginHorizontal="24dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="12dp"
            android:background="#33FFD700" />

        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollSavoir"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="0dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:clipToPadding="false"
            android:paddingHorizontal="16dp">

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <!-- PACK 2 — Section Savoirs Récents -->
                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutSavoirsRecents"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:paddingStart="12dp"
                    android:paddingEnd="12dp"
                    android:paddingBottom="16dp"
                    android:visibility="gone" />

                <LinearLayout
                    android:id="@+id/llGodsContainer"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:paddingBottom="20dp" />

            </LinearLayout>

        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>

</FrameLayout>

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnRetour"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:background="@android:color/transparent"

                android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"

        </FrameLayout>

            <LinearLayout

                </LinearLayout>

                <LinearLayout

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#000000">


    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/imgBackgroundZeus"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_splashscreen_zeus"
        android:visibility="invisible" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/imgLogo"
        android:layout_width="180dp"
        android:layout_height="180dp"
        android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
        app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/flashOverlay"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/overlay_lightning"
        android:visibility="gone" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/imgFinalLightning"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:src="@drawable/overlay_final_lightning"
        android:visibility="gone" />

    <View
        android:id="@+id/viewFlash"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#FFFFFF"
        android:visibility="gone" />

</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A"
    android:gravity="center"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:padding="20dp">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="18dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvEncounterTitle"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="Rencontre"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="24sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvEncounterType"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:text="Type"
            android:textColor="#FFE5B4"
            android:textSize="13sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvEncounterGod"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="4dp"
            android:text="Guide divin"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="13sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvEncounterDescription"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:text="Description du node."
            android:textColor="#FFFFFFFF"
            android:textSize="14sp" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvEncounterMessage"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:text="Message RPG."
            android:textColor="#FFE5B4"
            android:textSize="14sp" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="18dp"
            android:gravity="end"
            android:orientation="horizontal">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnEncounterBack"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                android:text="Retour"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                android:textColor="#1A0A00"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnEncounterValidate"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_marginStart="10dp"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
                android:text="Valider la rencontre"
                android:textAllCaps="false"
                android:textColor="#1A0A00"
                android:textStyle="bold" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

</LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#000000">

    <androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView
        android:id="@+id/pvTitleBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        app:resize_mode="zoom"
        app:surface_type="texture_view"
        app:use_controller="false" />

    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#16000000" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivDemarrer"
        android:layout_width="300dp"
        android:layout_height="200dp"
        android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal"
        android:layout_marginBottom="96dp"
        android:adjustViewBounds="true"
        android:clickable="true"
        android:contentDescription="Appuyer pour commencer"
        android:focusable="true"
        android:scaleType="fitCenter"
        android:src="@drawable/ic_demarrer" />

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/btnSupportTitle"
        android:layout_width="300dp"
        android:layout_height="48dp"
        android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal"
        android:layout_marginBottom="28dp"
        android:clickable="true"
        android:contentDescription="Contacter le Support Technique"
        android:focusable="true"
        android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground">

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:contentDescription="@null"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

        <ImageView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:alpha="0.30"
            android:contentDescription="@null"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_textelayout" />

        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:letterSpacing="0.04"
            android:text="✉  CONTACTER LE SUPPORT TECHNIQUE"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="12sp" />
    </FrameLayout>

    <!-- NOUVEAU : Bouton MAJ rouge en haut à gauche -->
    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/btnMajTitle"
        android:layout_width="56dp"
        android:layout_height="56dp"
        android:layout_gravity="top|start"
        android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="40dp"
        android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackground"
        android:clickable="true"
        android:contentDescription="Afficher les mises à jour"
        android:focusable="true"
        android:padding="8dp"
        android:scaleType="fitCenter"
        android:src="@drawable/maj" />

</FrameLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_trainin:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<RelativeLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:id="@+id/rootView"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#05050A">

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTrainingBackground"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:alpha="0.25"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_olympus_dark" />

    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivTitleBg"
        android:layout_width="320dp"
        android:layout_height="55dp"
        android:layout_centerHorizontal="true"
        android:layout_marginTop="24dp"
        android:scaleType="fitXY"
        android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvTitle"
        android:layout_width="320dp"
        android:layout_height="55dp"
        android:layout_centerHorizontal="true"
        android:layout_marginTop="24dp"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:elevation="2dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:text="⚔️ ARÈNE D'ENTRAÎNEMENT"
        android:textColor="#FFD700"
        android:textSize="18sp"
        android:textStyle="bold" />

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutGodSpeech"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_below="@id/tvTitle"
        android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
        android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgGodChibi"
            android:layout_width="85dp"
            android:layout_height="85dp"
            android:elevation="4dp"
            android:scaleType="fitCenter"
            android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />

        <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="65dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="5dp"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
            android:elevation="2dp"
            android:padding="12dp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvGodSpeech"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:minLines="2"
                android:text="Choisis ton arène d'entraînement !"
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="12sp"
                app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
        </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

    <FrameLayout
        android:id="@+id/btnEpreuveUltime"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="70dp"
        android:layout_below="@id/layoutGodSpeech"
        android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
        android:background="@drawable/button_ultime_selector"
        android:clickable="true"
        android:focusable="true">
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <ImageView android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_ultime_crown" />
            <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:orientation="vertical">
                <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel" android:text="⚡ ÉPREUVE ULTIME ⚡" android:textColor="#FFD700" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
                <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Toutes les matières • GAGNE DE L'XP" android:textColor="#FFFFFF" android:textSize="10sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

code.app/src/main/res/layout/activity_video_p:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    activity_video_player.xml — Lecteur vidéo cinématique
    ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Utilisé par VideoPlayerActivity pour :
    ① demarrer_aventure.mp4 (depuis Splash, PASSABLE par double-tap)
    ② Tout autre usage futur de vidéo plein écran passable

    Structure identique à activity_intro_video.xml pour cohérence :
    - PlayerView plein écran
    - tvSkipHint : hint qui apparaît sur le 1er tap
    - overlay léger pour profondeur
-->
<FrameLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#000000">

    <!-- Lecteur vidéo plein écran -->
    <androidx.media3.ui.PlayerView
        android:id="@+id/pvIntroVideo"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        app:resize_mode="zoom"
        app:show_buffering="never"
        app:use_controller="false" />

    <!-- Overlay très léger pour profondeur -->
    <View
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:background="#10000000" />

    <!-- Hint de skip — apparaît sur le 1er tap, 2ème tap = skip -->
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tvSkipHint"
        android:layout_width="300dp"
        android:layout_height="50dp"
        android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal"
        android:layout_marginStart="24dp"
        android:layout_marginEnd="24dp"
        android:layout_marginBottom="28dp"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
        android:elevation="8dp"
        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel"
        android:gravity="center"
        android:includeFontPadding="false"
        android:paddingStart="10dp"
        android:paddingTop="5dp"
        android:paddingEnd="10dp"
        android:paddingBottom="5dp"
        android:text="Touchez encore pour passer"
        android:textColor="@color/ambre_promethee"
        android:textSize="13sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        android:visibility="invisible" />

</FrameLayout>

<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:id="@+id/layoutGodExplanationRoot"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:layout_margin="16dp"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
    android:padding="18dp">

    <!-- CHANTIER 1.1 & 1.2
         Header premium avec portrait mieux cadré et hiérarchie visuelle propre. -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutGodHeader"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:gravity="center_vertical"
        android:orientation="horizontal">

        <FrameLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutPortraitFrame"
            android:layout_width="92dp"
            android:layout_height="92dp"
            android:background="#22111122"
            android:padding="6dp">

            <ImageView
                android:id="@+id/imgGodPortrait"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="match_parent"
                android:adjustViewBounds="true"
                android:contentDescription="@null"
                android:scaleType="fitCenter"
                android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />
        </FrameLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutGodTitleZone"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
            android:layout_weight="1"
            android:orientation="vertical">

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDialogTitle"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:ellipsize="end"
                android:maxLines="2"
                android:text="Zeus — Question 7"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="21sp"
                android:textStyle="bold" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDialogSubtitle"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="5dp"
                android:text="Correction divine"
                android:textColor="#CCFFFFFF"
                android:textSize="13sp" />

            <View
                android:id="@+id/viewHeaderAccent"
                android:layout_width="56dp"
                android:layout_height="2dp"
                android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
                android:background="#66FFD700" />
        </LinearLayout>
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- CHANTIER 1.1 & 1.2
         Bloc principal d'explication. -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutExplanationCard"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="18dp"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:background="#1AFFFFFF"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="16dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="16dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvExplanationLabel"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="EXPLICATION"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvGodExplanation"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:lineSpacingExtra="5dp"
            android:text="L'explication divine apparaîtra ici."
            android:textColor="#F5F5F5"
            android:textSize="16sp" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- CHANTIER 1.1 & 1.2
         Bloc mnémotechnique premium dédié. -->
    <LinearLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutMnemoZone"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_marginTop="14dp"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:background="#26FFD700"
        android:paddingStart="16dp"
        android:paddingTop="14dp"
        android:paddingEnd="16dp"
        android:paddingBottom="14dp">

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvMnemoLabel"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="⚡ MNÉMO DIVIN"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvGodMnemo"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp"
            android:text="Le mnemo apparaîtra ici."
            android:textColor="#FFF8DC"
            android:textSize="15sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

    <!-- CHANTIER 1.1 & 1.2
         Bouton intégré au layout pour remplacer le bouton système AlertDialog
         et garder une DA premium cohérente. -->
    <RelativeLayout
        android:id="@+id/layoutDialogButtonContainer"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="58dp"
        android:layout_marginTop="18dp">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/imgDialogButtonBg"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:contentDescription="@null"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnDialogConfirm"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="match_parent"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:text="COMPRIS ⚡"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </RelativeLayout>

</LinearLayout>

            android:id="@+id/tvLoadingMessage"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"
            android:text="Consultation de l'Olympe..."
            android:textColor="#FFFFFFFF"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold" />
    </LinearLayout>

</FrameLayout>

code.app/src/main/res/layout/dialog_oracle_ch:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:fillViewport="true"
    android:scrollbars="none">

    <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
        android:padding="20dp">

        <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/ivOracleTitleBg"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="50dp"
            android:elevation="0dp"
            android:scaleType="fitXY"
            android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvOracleTitle"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="50dp"
            android:background="@android:color/transparent"
            android:elevation="2dp"
            android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:letterSpacing="0.12"
            android:text="⚡ L'ORACLE VOUS ATTEND ⚡"
            android:textColor="#FFD700"
            android:textSize="16sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutZeusDialog"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvOracleTitle">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="56dp"
                android:layout_height="56dp"
                android:contentDescription="Zeus"
                android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />

            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvZeusDialogSpeech"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginStart="10dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
                android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                android:minLines="2"
                android:padding="10dp"
                android:text=""
                android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                android:textSize="12sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <View
            android:id="@+id/dividerTop"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="1dp"
            android:layout_marginTop="14dp"
            android:background="#33FFD700"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutZeusDialog" />

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnCamera"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="14dp"
            android:background="@drawable/button_divine_selector"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:elevation="4dp"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:padding="14dp"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/dividerTop">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="80dp"
                android:layout_height="80dp"
                android:src="@drawable/ic_menu_camera" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="📸 ARTEFACT DIVIN"
                    android:textColor="#FFD700"
                    android:textSize="13sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="3dp"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:text="Utilise l'Oeil Divin sur ton Parchemin"
                    android:textColor="#AAAAAA"
                    android:textSize="11sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="›"
                android:textColor="#FFD700"
                android:textSize="22sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutOu"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnCamera">

            <View
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="1dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:background="#33FFFFFF" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginHorizontal="12dp"
                android:text="— OU —"
                android:textColor="#888888"
                android:textSize="10sp" />

            <View
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="1dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:background="#33FFFFFF" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnGallery"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:background="@drawable/button_divine_selector"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:elevation="4dp"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:padding="14dp"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutOu">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="80dp"
                android:layout_height="80dp"
                android:src="@drawable/ic_new_img" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="📚 BIBLIOTHÈQUE DU SAVOIR"
                    android:textColor="#87CEEB"
                    android:textSize="13sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="3dp"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:text="Invoque Ton Parchemin Depuis La Galerie Celeste"
                    android:textColor="#AAAAAA"
                    android:textSize="11sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="›"
                android:textColor="#87CEEB"
                android:textSize="22sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/btnCreateFromPrompt"
            android:layout_width="0dp"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="10dp"
            android:background="@drawable/button_divine_selector"
            android:clickable="true"
            android:elevation="4dp"
            android:focusable="true"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:padding="14dp"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnGallery">

            <ImageView
                android:layout_width="80dp"
                android:layout_height="80dp"
                android:src="@drawable/ic_oracle_summary_forge" />

            <LinearLayout
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginStart="14dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:text="✍️ CRÉER À PARTIR D'UNE DEMANDE"
                    android:textColor="#C9A7FF"
                    android:textSize="13sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="3dp"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                    android:text="Écris ce que tu veux comprendre et l'Oracle forgera un résumé puis un quiz"
                    android:textColor="#AAAAAA"
                    android:textSize="11sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="›"
                android:textColor="#C9A7FF"
                android:textSize="22sp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/btnCancelOracle"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="20dp"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:text="↩ RETOUR AU DASHBOARD"
            android:textColor="@color/incorrect_text"
            android:textSize="12sp"
            app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent"
            app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/btnCreateFromPrompt"
            app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="1.0" />

    </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollVi
code.app/src/main/res/layout/dialog_rpg_unive:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#55000000"
    android:clickable="true"
    android:focusable="true">

    <ScrollView
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:layout_gravity="center"
        android:layout_margin="24dp"
        android:fillViewport="false">

        <LinearLayout
            android:id="@+id/layoutDialogRoot"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:padding="20dp">

            <!-- TITRE (optionnel) -->
            <FrameLayout
                android:id="@+id/layoutTitleContainer"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:visibility="gone">

                <ImageView
                    android:id="@+id/imgTitleBg"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="48dp"
                    android:scaleType="fitXY"
                    android:src="@drawable/bg_divine_card" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvDialogTitle"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="48dp"
                    android:gravity="center"
                    android:textColor="#FFD700"
                    android:textSize="18sp"
                    android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                    android:letterSpacing="0.08"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />
            </FrameLayout>

            <!-- ZONE CHIBI + TEXTE NARRATIF -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/layoutNarrativeZone"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="16dp"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:orientation="horizontal">

                <!-- Chibi animé du dieu -->
                <FrameLayout
                    android:layout_width="80dp"
                    android:layout_height="80dp"
                    android:background="#22111122"
                    android:padding="4dp">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/imgGodChibi"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="match_parent"
                        android:scaleType="fitCenter"
                        android:src="@drawable/avatar_zeus_dialog" />
                </FrameLayout>

                <!-- Texte principal (typewriter) -->
                <LinearLayout
                    android:layout_width="0dp"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginStart="12dp"
                    android:layout_weight="1"
                    android:background="@drawable/bg_rpg_dialog"
                    android:orientation="vertical"
                    android:padding="12dp">

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvGodName"
                        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:text="Zeus"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:textSize="12sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvDialogMainText"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                        android:layout_marginTop="6dp"
                        android:lineSpacingExtra="4dp"
                        android:minLines="2"
                        android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                        android:fontFamily="@font/exo2"
                        android:textSize="14sp" />
                </LinearLayout>
            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- ZONE ADDITIONNELLE (optionnelle - détails, mnémo, etc.) -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/layoutAdditionalInfo"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="14dp"
                android:background="#1AFFFFFF"
                android:orientation="vertical"
                android:padding="14dp"
                android:visibility="gone">

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvAdditionalLabel"
                    android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:text="DÉTAILS"
                    android:textColor="#FFD700"
                    android:textSize="11sp"
                    android:textStyle="bold" />

                <TextView
                    android:id="@+id/tvAdditionalText"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
                    android:lineSpacingExtra="3dp"
                    android:textColor="#F5F5F5"
                    android:textSize="13sp" />
            </LinearLayout>

            <!-- CONTAINER BOUTONS (1 à 3 boutons) -->
            <LinearLayout
                android:id="@+id/layoutButtonsContainer"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_marginTop="14dp"
                android:orientation="vertical">

                <!-- Bouton 1 (principal / confirm) -->
                <FrameLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutButton1"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="48dp"
                    android:clickable="true"
                    android:focusable="true">

                    <ImageView
                        android:id="@+id/imgButton1Bg"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="match_parent"
                        android:scaleType="fitXY"
                        android:src="@drawable/bg_temple_button" />

                    <TextView
                        android:id="@+id/tvButton1"
                        android:layout_width="match_parent"
                        android:layout_height="match_parent"
                        android:gravity="center"
                        android:text="COMPRIS ⚡"
                        android:textColor="#FFD700"
                        android:fontFamily="@font/cinzel_bold"
                        android:letterSpacing="0.06"
                        android:textSize="15sp"
                        android:textStyle="bold" />
                </FrameLayout>

                <!-- Bouton 2 (secondaire / cancel) -->
                <FrameLayout
                    android:id="@+id/layoutButton2"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="48dp"
                    android:layout_marginTop="8dp"

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    item_avatar.xml — VERSION FINALE
    Carte 260×360dp. Zéro drawable superflu.
    ID ivAvatarImage conservé → AvatarAdapter.kt inchangé.
-->
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="260dp"
    android:layout_height="360dp"
    android:layout_gravity="center"
    android:padding="6dp">

    <!-- Image du héros — ID INCHANGÉ pour AvatarAdapter -->
    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivAvatarImage"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:adjustViewBounds="false"
        android:contentDescription="Avatar RéviZeus"
        android:scaleType="fitCenter"
        android:transitionName="avatarImage" />

</FrameLayout>
code.app/src/main/res/layout/item_avatar_aura:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
    item_avatar.xml — VERSION AURA
    ════════════════════════════════
    - Taille 240×380dp (plus large que 260dp qui laissait trop peu pour les voisins)
    - padding supprimé → image pleine carte
    - scaleType="centerCrop" → remplit toute la carte sans bande noire
    - LottieAnimationView (id ivAvatarAura) derrière l'image pour l'aura
      → couleur changée dynamiquement dans AvatarAdapter via addValueCallback
    - ID ivAvatarImage CONSERVÉ — structure AvatarAdapter inchangée
-->
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    android:layout_width="240dp"
    android:layout_height="380dp"
    android:layout_gravity="center">

    <!--
        Aura Lottie — dessinée EN DESSOUS de l'avatar.
        Taille supérieure à la carte pour déborder visuellement (effet halo).
        La couleur est appliquée dynamiquement dans AvatarAdapter.kt.
        loop=true, autoPlay=true.
        Si le fichier lottie_avatar_aura.json est absent : silencieux (try/catch adapter).
    -->
    <com.airbnb.lottie.LottieAnimationView
        android:id="@+id/ivAvatarAura"
        android:layout_width="450dp"
        android:layout_height="500dp"
        android:layout_gravity="center"
        app:lottie_autoPlay="true"
        app:lottie_loop="true"
        app:lottie_rawRes="@raw/lottie_avatar_aura"
        app:lottie_speed="0.8" />

    <!--
        Image principale du héros.
        ID INCHANGÉ → AvatarAdapter.kt bind sur ce même id.
        centerCrop : remplit toute la carte, pas de bandes noires.
    -->
    <ImageView
        android:id="@+id/ivAvatarImage"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent"
        android:contentDescription="Avatar RéviZeus"
        android:scaleType="centerCrop"
        android:transitionName="avatarImage" />

</FrameLayout>
